missionPage.quote: "Every package promoted is one less in the trash and one more in the hands of those who need it."

promisesItems.title: Constant Waste Reduction
promisesItems.description: Our goal is to progressively reduce pharmaceutical waste within our network, increasing the number of products saved each year.

promisesItems.title: Expansion of the Sustainable Network
promisesItems.description: We are working to involve more and more businesses in the recovery cycle, extending the positive impact throughout the country.

promisesItems.title: Education on Zero Waste
promisesItems.description: We raise awareness among businesses and consumers about the importance of reducing pharmaceutical waste, creating a culture of sustainability.

missionPage.ctaTitle: Together, we can end pharmaceutical waste
missionPage.ctaDescription: Every purchase you make on FarmaDoc is a vote for a more sustainable, equitable healthcare system.

purposeSection.title: The foundation of our purpose
purposeSection.description: Every product on FarmaDoc actively reduces pharmaceutical waste and makes healthcare more accessible. We are committed to promoting ethical trade, ensuring that health and environmental responsibility go hand in hand.

sustainability.title: Sustainability
sustainability.description: Italy discards an estimated €500 million worth of pharmaceutical products annually due to surplus stock and near-expiry dates. FarmaDoc intercepts this waste by creating a market for it. Every product promoted on our platform is a product that doesn't end up in a landfill.

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.description: Medication affordability is a real barrier for millions of Italian families. FarmaDoc brings discounts of up to 70% on authentic pharmaceutical products, making health products accessible to those who need them most, regardless of income.

efficiency.title: Efficiency
efficiency.description: Traditional pharmaceutical retail is fragmented, slow, and opaque. FarmaDoc centralizes geo-based discovery, booking, and in-store pickup — creating a friction-free loop between inventory and patient. Our platform manages everything so pharmacies can focus on care.

banner.title: Save Before Waste, Affordable Pharmacy Deals Near You
banner.subtitle: Discover discounted pharmacy products available for local pick-up only

left.title: We help reduce pharmaceutical waste.
left.description: FarmaDoc is the marketplace where we help users find quality products at great prices at pharmacies and drugstores.

affordable.title: Affordable Prices
affordable.description: Access exclusive discounts on medicines & over the counter products

waste.title: Reduce Waste
waste.description: Help the environment by reducing waste and the planet will thank you!

proximity.title: Proximity
proximity.description: Not just online shopping, real pharmacies, real professionals.

pharmacyBanner.description: Save more on verified pharmacy stock, reserve online and pick up in-store today.

pharmaMovement.title: Join the Movement Against Pharmaceutical Waste
pharmaMovement.description: Join Italy's leading marketplace for surplus and near-expiry pharmacy products. Reduce waste, increase revenue, and reach new customers in your area.

whyChoose.title: Why Choose FarmaDoc?
whyChoose.description: All products on FarmaDoc come directly from licensed pharmacies and remain fully safe, effective, and compliant until their expiry date. Each item is carefully stored and handled under strict pharmacy standards.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know, from reservations to pickups, all in one place.
faq.empty: No FAQs available for this section right now.

q1.question: Are near-expiry medicines safe to use?
q1.answer: Yes. All medicines listed on FarmaDoc are approved, sealed, and sourced directly from licensed pharmacies.

q2.question: Why are these medicines available at lower prices?
q2.answer: Pharmacies sell surplus or near-expiry inventory at discounted prices.

expiring.title: Save Before Waste, Expiring Soon
expiring.subtitle: Don't miss out on these soon-to-expire medicines.

testimonials.title: Huge Savings Without Compromise
testimonials.quote: I saved almost EUR40 on supplements that were still months away from expiry. Pickup was smooth and the pharmacy staff were very friendly.
testimonials.author: Laura M., Milano

testimonials.title: Quick and Convenient
testimonials.quote: The online reservation and pickup system is so easy! I got my medicines without waiting in long queues.
testimonials.author: Marco T., Rome

testimonials.title: Trusted and Safe
testimonials.quote: I was initially skeptical about near-expiry medicines, but FarmaDoc ensures everything is safe and verified by licensed pharmacies.
testimonials.author: Elena R., Turin

testimonials.title: Fantastic Customer Support
testimonials.quote: Their customer service answered all my questions promptly. I feel confident ordering from FarmaDoc again.
testimonials.author: Giovanni L., Florence

testimonials.title: Saves Time and Money
testimonials.quote: I discovered great deals on supplements and medications near me. It really helps reduce waste and saves me money.
testimonials.author: Sara P., Naples

bookable.title: Bookable vs. Showroom
bookable.subtitle: FarmaDoc offers two types of listings depending on how the pharmacy chooses to sell.

pharmacy.title: Pharmacy Items
pharmacy.description: Discovered deals before visiting. Pharmacy items are visible on FarmaDoc but purchased directly at the pharmacy counter — no reservation needed.

showroom.title: Showroom Items
showroom.description: Reserve your item online and have it held exclusively for you at the pharmacy for 72 hours. A full payment deposit may apply to confirm booking.

journey.label: Our Journey
journey.title: A decade of healthcare innovation
journey.description: FarmaDoc's geo-discovery engine surfaces the closest pharmacies with the best deals in real time. We show you what's available within 0.5km, 1km, and 5km of your location.

promises.title: No app required. Works on any device.
promises.description: FarmaDoc works fully from your browser on desktop or mobile. No downloads, no accounts required to browse — just find deals and save.

noAccount.title: No account needed to browse
noAccount.description: Explore deals anonymously. Only sign up when you want to book.

instant.title: Instant confirmation
instant.description: Book a deal and receive your pickup confirmation in under 30 seconds.

inventory.title: Real-time inventory updates
inventory.description: Stock levels update live so you're never disappointed at pickup.

main.title: From search to pickup in minutes
main.description: FarmaDoc makes discovering, reserving, and collecting discounted pharmaceutical products effortless. Here's exactly how it works.

step1.label: Step 1
step1.title: Search Nearby Pharmacies
step1.desc: Enter your address or allow location access to instantly see all FarmaDoc-partnered pharmacies in your area. Filter by distance, category, or discount level.

step2.label: Step 2
step2.title: Discover Deals & Offers
step2.desc: Browse curated pharmaceutical deals managed by the FarmaDoc team. All products are verified, and listed with transparent pricing and discount percentages.

step3.label: Step 3
step3.title: Reserve or Book
step3.desc: Choose between Bookable items (hold for 24h with a small deposit) or Showroom items (visit the pharmacy to purchase). No commitment required for browsing.

step4.label: Step 4
step4.title: Pay Online or at Pickup
step4.desc: Complete your transaction online via card, or pay directly at the pharmacy counter during pickup. Both options are fully supported — your choice.

step5.label: Step 5
step5.title: Collect from the Pharmacy
step5.desc: Head to your chosen pharmacy and collect your reserved products at the dedicated FarmaDoc pickup counter. Show your confirmation QR code and you're done.

whoWeAre.heroParagraph1: FarmaDoc was built on a simple belief: pharmaceutical access shouldn’t be a privilege. Since 2014, we’ve been bridging the gap between pharmacies with surplus stock and patients who need affordable medication.
whoWeAre.heroParagraph2: What started as a small experiment in Milan has grown into Italy’s largest pharmaceutical marketplace — connecting 850+ pharmacies with 120,000+ customers who save every single day.
whoWeAre.card1Desc: Every decision is made with the patient’s affordability and health access in mind.
whoWeAre.card2Desc: Reducing pharmaceutical waste is at the core of everything we build.
whoWeAre.card3Desc: Products guaranteed thanks to the local pharmaceutical supply chain.
whoWeAre.card4Desc: Local pharmacies, local economies, we believe in strengthening communities.
whoWeAre.bottomTitle: Building a healthier, more sustainable Italy
whoWeAre.bottomDescription: Every transaction through FarmaDoc has a double impact: it saves customers money and prevents pharmaceutical waste from entering landfill. This is commerce with conscience.
whoWeAre.ctaDescription: FarmaDoc aims to have a dual impact: saving customers money and reducing pharmaceutical waste.

showroom.title: FarmaDoc Showroom
showroom.subtitle: Turn your pharmacy into a premium digital showroom and attract more customers.
showroom.benefit1: Priority placement in search and map results
showroom.benefit2: Featured pharmacy badge for higher trust
showroom.benefit3: Highlighted product listings with promo tags
showroom.notOnDesc: No worries, still you can register as pharmacy or Para pharmacy for free.

hero.description: FarmaDoc exists to solve two interconnected crises: the €500M annual pharmaceutical waste problem in Italy and the affordability gap that keeps essential medications out of reach for millions.
